lines.text: Ahem… I'm afraid I don't understand, Miss Carlotta. It seems you too are lost to madness and hallucination…
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: If you find yourself confused and desire the Sentinel's guidance, I would gladly arrange... a personal Pilgrim's Sail for you.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
